label: Transparent jaguar motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Jaguar transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a jaguar rosette coat motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A powerful jaguar profile or three-quarter body showing golden fur, black open rosettes with central dots, muscular rainforest-cat build, amber tan undercoat, dark nose, whiskers, and subtle jungle-green reflected shadows. The markings must be jaguar rosettes, not leopard spots, cheetah dots, or tiger stripes.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include head, shoulders, body markings, paws or tail cue without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no leopard, no cheetah, no tiger stripes, no panther-only black coat, no jungle landscape, no props, no text, no watermark, no second animal.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jaguar light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Jaguar", derived from the visible jaguar rosette coat cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Jaguar, Jaguar Rosette Coat, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from gold fur, black rosette rings, central rosette dots, amber undercoat, jungle-green rainforest cues, warm hide surfaces, and deep rainforest shadow. The board must read as jaguar, not leopard, cheetah, or tiger.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible against patterned accents.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: powerful analytics product system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, warm hide surfaces, jungle-gold primary actions, rosette-black text and focus, canopy-green success states, rosette texture strips, dense dashboard hierarchy, strong but refined shadows.
Constraints: no leopard spot theme, no cheetah dots, no tiger stripes, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Jaguar", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jaguar dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Jaguar". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible jaguar rosette coat cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Jaguar, Jaguar Rosette Coat, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same jaguar system language as the visible light board: rainforest-shadow panels, gold fur actions, black rosette borders, amber undercoat highlights, jungle-green controls, canopy success states, rosette texture, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark patterned surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep brown-black rainforest surfaces, pale gold foregrounds, jungle-gold active states, canopy-green signals, amber chart accents, rosette overlays used sparingly, crisp 8px cards, strong readable contrast.
Constraints: no leopard, no cheetah, no tiger stripes, no neon jungle colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Jaguar", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
